title: Strength in Harmony
materials: Natural wood veneer marquetry on birch panel
framed: Unframed — arrives ready to hang or frame
shipping: White-glove fine art courier, worldwide, fully insured in transit
story: A double portrait that resists easy reading. Two presences, two grain directions, two emotional temperatures — placed side by side in a composition that cannot be separated from the relationship it depicts. The contrast between the lighter and deeper veneer palettes is not a stylistic choice: it is the subject of the work. Harmony does not require sameness. These two figures are distinct and inseparable in the same breath.
